name: Captain Drew Renda
photo_main_alt: Captain Drew Renda holding a striped bass on F/V Bad Cast
photo_secondary_alt: Captain Drew and Donna on the water at golden hour
paragraphs: Capt Drew has been fishing the New Meadows watershed for over 20 years. We will keep the hunt moving while we drift the edges, ledges and shallows. He loves sharing that knowledge with people who want to learn.
Whether you've never held a fly rod or you've been casting for decades, Drew meets you where you are. He's patient, communicative, and focused on making sure you have a great day on the water.
F/V Bad Cast is a 21-foot Grady-White rigged for both fly fishing and spin casting. Safety gear is always on board. The boat is licensed for shark and tuna if you want to push further out.
We don’t wait with bait. We keep casting!
